title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 228.080 - Order to establish road, when
text:
228.080.  Order to establish road, when. — If it shall appear from the engineer's report that the right-of-way has been secured, and needs therefor filed, or that the damages claimed do not exceed the amount offered by the commission or deposited by the petitioners, or both, the commission shall order the road established.
(L. 1949 p. 551 § 8475c)
